metadata.title: Delayed verified access block
metadata.description: The decisive evidence predates the ticket by more than one day.

visible.customer_issue: The customer reports the issue late and says support verification was completed.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_7002 from support records and active policy.
tool_guidance: Choose evidence windows that cover the complete incident timeline.
Use active policy before any write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: Ben's lockout and reset evidence occurred roughly 38 hours before the delayed ticket. Current verification is valid, so unlock is allowed.
expected_behavior: Search far enough back to observe the incident.
Confirm valid verification and active policy.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: Verification is current and no compromise signal exists.

failure_traps.description: Ticket-day queries return no decisive events.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent fails to search the older incident period.
